title: sample_sets.tsv row — WHO
description: One sample set: which catfish (or whatever individuals), in what order. The base of every contract — group_sets, input_values, and analysis_results all FK back to sample_set_id.

path.description: Path to the actual samples TSV (one row per sample, with sample_id + bam_path columns).

order_key.description: How sample order is defined: 'file_order' (the row order in path) or a column name to sort by. BEAGLE column order MUST match this.

hash.description: sha256 of canonical (sorted) sample_id list. Lets you detect 'is this the same set?' across machines.
